mappings.disposition: Remove the timer factory from DeviceRuntime; G06 provider/backend spans use OperationContract profile-phase identity and G08D removes the legacy method.
Replace with typed DeviceRuntime stream creation; G08D removes the legacy method after backend migration.
Replace the generic closure scope with typed DeviceRuntime device selection; G08D removes the non-object-safe legacy method.
Represent device-ordinal scope as a typed DeviceRuntime capability; remove the independent boolean and let G08D delete the legacy method.
Replace with typed DeviceRuntime command synchronization and domain-checked IdentifiedFailure carrying the exact execution identity; G08D removes the legacy method.
Represent capture state as typed DeviceRuntime command state; G08D removes the legacy probe method.
Fold the readback ordering rule into typed DeviceRuntime copy/readback; G08D removes the legacy hook.
Read element width from the typed DeviceRuntime buffer descriptor; G08D removes the global activation-width method.
Move the family batching requirement into ModelProgram and resolve providers during planning; G08D removes the backend-family policy branch.
Derive availability from a versioned qk-norm-rope provider contract; remove the independent boolean and let G08D delete the legacy method.
Derive availability from a versioned batched KV-append provider contract; remove the independent boolean and let G08D delete the legacy method.
Derive availability from a versioned batched-attention provider contract; remove the independent boolean and let G08D delete the legacy method.
Replace with typed DeviceRuntime zero-fill command encoding; unsupported devices return a domain-checked IdentifiedFailure and G08D removes the legacy default.
Replace with typed DeviceRuntime allocation governed by ResourceTransaction; G08D removes the legacy method.
Replace with typed DeviceRuntime allocation plus host-to-device copy; G08D removes the legacy method.
Replace with typed DeviceRuntime host-to-device copy into an owned buffer; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register a versioned GEMM OperationContract and provider; ExecutionPlanner selects it once and G08D removes the legacy method.
Register a versioned RMSNorm OperationContract and provider; ExecutionPlanner selects it once and G08D removes the legacy method.
Register a versioned fused add-RMSNorm OperationContract and provider; no success default survives and G08D removes the legacy method.
Register a versioned attention OperationContract with explicit shape/layout requirements; planner selects it once and G08D removes the legacy method.
Represent MLA as an explicit versioned operation; an absent provider is a planning rejection and G08D removes the unsupported legacy default.
Register the recurrent DeltaNet update as a versioned operation with state/layout contracts; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register the batched recurrent DeltaNet update as a versioned operation; planner resolves it once and G08D removes the legacy method.
Derive indexed recurrent-state availability from provider contracts; remove the model-named boolean and let G08D delete the legacy method.
Move supported state dtype into the architecture-neutral recurrent operation contract; G08D removes the model-named legacy method.
Derive packed GDN decode preparation availability from a versioned provider contract; G08D removes the model-named boolean.
Derive packed GDN prefill preparation availability from a versioned provider contract; G08D removes the model-named boolean.
Derive packed recurrent-decode availability from a versioned provider contract; G08D removes the model-named boolean.
Register indexed batched DeltaNet update as a versioned stateful operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register packed indexed DeltaNet update as a versioned stateful operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register variable-length DeltaNet update as a versioned stateful operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register linear-attention preparation as a versioned operation with explicit state/layout; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register variable-length linear-attention preparation as a versioned operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register packed variable-length linear-attention preparation as a versioned operation; G08D removes the model-layout legacy method.
Register stateful decode preparation as a versioned operation; ExecutionPlanner selects it once and G08D removes the legacy method.
Register batched stateful decode preparation as a versioned operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register indexed batched decode preparation as a versioned stateful operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register packed indexed QKVZ/BA decode preparation as a versioned operation; G08D removes the model-layout legacy method.
Register packed indexed QKVZ-to-mixed decode preparation as a versioned operation; G08D removes the model-layout legacy method.
Register gated RMSNorm as a versioned operation with an explicit oracle; G08D removes the legacy method.
Replace with bounds-checked typed DeviceRuntime buffer copy; G08D removes the legacy method.
Register host-index embedding gather as a versioned operation; planner selects it once and G08D removes the legacy method.
Register device-index embedding gather as a distinct versioned operation; no host round-trip default survives and G08D removes the legacy method.
Register QKV split as a versioned layout operation; G08D removes the legacy method.
